summary: Completed testing of Script Persistence features (iteration 21). All 4 priorities verified: 1) Parallel batching BATCH_SIZE=3 confirmed at App.js line 181. 2) Script persistence working - GET /api/scripts lists recent scripts, GET /api/scripts/{id} returns full script with breakdowns, no re-analysis on reload. 3) Rehearsal tools (MemorizationMode, SceneReader) work without GPT calls - MemorizationMode has ZERO network calls, SceneReader only calls /api/tts/generate. 4) Cost safety verified - loading persisted scripts does NOT trigger /api/analyze calls.
passed_tests: Backend: API root endpoint accessible - PASS
Backend: GET /api/scripts returns list of recent scripts - PASS (found 5+ scripts)
Backend: Scripts list has required fields (id, character_name, mode, created_at, breakdown_count) - PASS
Backend: Scripts list includes prep_mode and project_type fields - PASS
Backend: GET /api/scripts/{id} returns full script with breakdowns array - PASS
Backend: Breakdowns have all required fields (scene_summary, character_objective, stakes, beats, acting_takes, memorization, self_tape_tips) - PASS
Backend: Non-existent script returns 404 - PASS
Backend: POST /api/scripts/create stores prep_mode and project_type - PASS
Backend: Script with booked prep_mode created successfully - PASS
Backend: Script with vertical project_type created successfully - PASS
Backend: Script load does NOT trigger GPT analysis (fast response <5s) - PASS
Backend: breakdown_count matches actual breakdowns count - PASS
Backend: Multiple loads return identical data (no re-analysis) - PASS
Frontend: Landing page shows 'My Scripts' section - PASS
Frontend: My Scripts section shows 5 recent scripts with metadata - PASS
Frontend: Clicking script loads ScriptOverview with scene tabs - PASS (Felix with 21 scenes)
Frontend: Toast shows 'Loaded "Felix" — 21 scenes' - PASS
Frontend: Scene tabs visible and navigable - PASS (21 tabs)
Frontend: Action bar shows Run Lines, Memorize, Go Deeper buttons - PASS
Frontend: Scene Summary, Objective, Stakes, Beat Breakdown visible - PASS
Frontend: No /api/analyze calls when loading persisted script - PASS
Frontend: Script loaded via GET /api/scripts/{id} only - PASS
Frontend: MemorizationMode has ZERO network calls - PASS (verified via code and runtime)
Frontend: SceneReader only calls /api/tts/generate (TTS, not GPT) - PASS
Frontend: BATCH_SIZE=3 confirmed in App.js line 181 - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: App.js line 181: BATCH_SIZE = 3 correctly set for parallel batching
App.js lines 318-344: handleLoadScript correctly loads script via GET /api/scripts/{id} without triggering analysis
App.js lines 42-43: recentScripts fetched on mount via GET /api/scripts
UploadPage.jsx lines 1068-1108: My Scripts section correctly displays recent scripts with data-testid='recent-script-{id}'
MemorizationMode.jsx: ZERO axios/fetch imports - purely client-side rehearsal tool
SceneReader.jsx line 92: Only network call is axios.post to /api/tts/generate for TTS
server.py lines 1392-1398: GET /api/scripts returns list with breakdown_count computed from breakdown_ids
server.py lines 1401-1417: GET /api/scripts/{id} returns full script with all breakdowns embedded
server.py lines 1421-1436: POST /api/scripts/create stores prep_mode and project_type
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_PersistenceTest, TEST_BookedRole, TEST_VerticalProject scripts for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Script persistence feature fully implemented and tested. Key flows: 1) GET /api/scripts lists recent scripts with metadata (breakdown_count, prep_mode, project_type). 2) GET /api/scripts/{id} returns full script with all breakdowns embedded - NO GPT calls. 3) Frontend My Scripts section on landing page loads scripts instantly. 4) MemorizationMode is 100% client-side (no network calls). 5) SceneReader only calls /api/tts/generate for TTS. 6) BATCH_SIZE=3 for parallel scene analysis.

parallel_batching_batch_size_3.details: BATCH_SIZE = 3 at App.js line 181, scenes processed in parallel batches

script_persistence_list.details: GET /api/scripts returns list with id, character_name, mode, breakdown_count, prep_mode, project_type, created_at

script_persistence_load.details: GET /api/scripts/{id} returns full script with all breakdowns - no GPT calls

my_scripts_section.details: Landing page shows My Scripts section with recent scripts, clicking loads ScriptOverview

no_reanalysis_on_reload.details: Loading persisted script does NOT trigger /api/analyze calls - verified via network monitoring

memorization_mode_no_network.details: MemorizationMode.jsx has ZERO axios/fetch imports - purely client-side

scene_reader_tts_only.details: SceneReader.jsx only calls /api/tts/generate (line 92) - no GPT calls

prep_mode_project_type_storage.details: POST /api/scripts/create stores prep_mode and project_type, returned in GET responses
